title: macrotyloma axillare var. glabrum
intro: Macrotyloma axillare var. glabrum is a variant of the Macrotyloma axillare plant, a legume native to India and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Macrotyloma axillare var. glabrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, and its seeds are also consumed as a nutritious food.
